humans.profile_body:
# Adrian

Reddit and distributed marketing operator since 2013. Built Karmable.

## Rent for

- Designing distributed marketing campaigns across Reddit, HN, and niche forums
- Auditing existing fleet operations that are getting flagged or shadowbanned
- Launch day choreography for technical and dev tools (Reddit + HN + Twitter)
- Persona engineering for fleets above 50 accounts
- Sub mapping and ICP-to-community fit for B2B SaaS

## Anti-specialties

- Paid acquisition (Google, Meta, LinkedIn ads)
- Enterprise sales motions
- Bot networks or vote manipulation — I do not and will not
- Engagements under $5k

## Past work

- **ZeroEntropy** — Head of Growth. Distributed community presence across r/MachineLearning, r/LocalLLaMA, r/RAG.
- **Karmable** — Founder. Platform for operating distributed marketing at scale.
- *(More on request, with NDA where applicable.)*

## How I work

Async-first. Loom + Notion + Slack > calls. First 1-2 weeks mapping ICP, communities, and voice. Then weekly sync + async execution.

## Currently

- Building Karmable (full-time)
- Head of Growth at ZeroEntropy (part-time)
- Open to 1 retainer client in Q3 2026, focused on technical B2B SaaS

---
